Security audit
Summary: 4 critical · 2 warn · 1 info
  CRITICAL Small models require sandboxing
    Model policy is unsafe for exposed channels.
    Fix: Enable sandbox and disable elevated tools.
  CRITICAL Open groupPolicy with elevated tools
    Any group can trigger powerful tools.
    Fix: Use allowlist and disable elevated tools.
  CRITICAL Open groupPolicy with runtime/filesystem tools
    Runtime and filesystem access exposed.
    Fix: Restrict tool permissions.
  CRITICAL Discord groupPolicy='open' allows broad trigger scope
    Any non-denied channel can trigger.
    Fix: Set groupPolicy=allowlist.
  WARN trustedProxies empty while bind is loopback
    Reverse proxy headers may be misconfigured.
    Fix: Configure trusted proxies.
  WARN Multi-user setup with runtime/process tools
    Process tools exposed broadly.
    Fix: Lock down runtime/process tools.
  INFO Version detected
    Audit includes runtime version context.
